dj_text: This message was brought to you by That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. The entity behind the signal is friendly. Probably. The Rhythm of The Night (Medieval Cover) was just the appetizer. Who Let the Dogs Out (Medieval Cover) is the main course!
commercial_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm. Yeah. That's... that's the smooth.
